digest.title: DAILY MORNING DIGEST
digest.auto_skipped:
Auto digest skipped: no tracked queries saved.
Use /track <query> to add products for automatic reports.

reddit.title: REDDIT HYPE SIGNALS
reddit.no_results: No Reddit hype signals found for "{category}"

competitor.title: COMPETITOR TRACKER
competitor.no_results: No sold listings found for seller "{seller}"

discovery.title: STORE DISCOVERY
discovery.usage:
Usage: /discoverstores <niche or category>
Example: /discoverstores pet accessories
discovery.connect_first:
Connect StoreLeads first to discover competitor stores.
Use /connect storeleads YOUR_STORELEADS_KEY

ad_discovery.title: AD DISCOVERY
ad_discovery.usage:
Usage: /discoverads <product or niche>
Example: /discoverads pet hair remover
ad_discovery.connect_first:
Connect PiPiADS first to discover trending ads.
Use /connect pipiads YOUR_PIPIADS_KEY

common.welcome:
Welcome back to DropAgent!

Quick actions:
• /digest — today's product opportunities
• /track <keyword> — start tracking a niche
• /discoverstores <keyword> — find competitor stores
• /calc <buy> <sell> — check your margin

Type /help to see all commands.

onboarding.title: DROPAGENT SETUP
onboarding.intro: Let's build your starter environment. I'll show the minimum stack, then recommend must-have and high-value services for your model.
onboarding.cta: Tap Begin setup to choose your model and save the integrations you already have. Use /setup anytime to run this again.
onboarding.model_intro: Pick the model you want DropAgent to optimize first.
onboarding.integrations_intro: Toggle what you already use or plan to connect. Live connectors work now; planned connectors are saved for future setup.
onboarding.starter_pack_body: Minimum baseline: Telegram Bot Token + eBay App ID + Database URL. Without those, the agent cannot run end-to-end.
onboarding.skipped: Setup skipped for now. You can run /setup anytime.
onboarding.complete_next: Next step: add tracked queries with /track, then use /digest or /weekly.

status_cmd.title: Current stack status:
status_cmd.next_choose_sources: Choose at least one source in setup so product checks can run end-to-end.
status_cmd.next_add_query: Add your first tracked product with /track so digest and alerts have something to monitor.
status_cmd.next_enable_digest: Turn on the digest schedule so DropAgent starts sending you regular reports.
status_cmd.next_deeper_validation: Add Keepa or ZIK later if you want stronger product validation before buying.
status_cmd.next_discovery: Add one discovery integration later to find more winners and competitors faster.
status_cmd.next_ready: Your setup is in a good place. Start using /digest, /weekly, and your dashboard daily.

No tracked queries saved yet.
Use /track <query> to add one.

Remaining tracked queries: {remaining}
